source:
<ion-list class="preserve-padding">

  <ion-list-header>{{ 'Expansion 1' | translate }}</ion-list-header>
  <ion-item (click)="close(faction.id)" *ngFor="let faction of originalFactions">
    <ion-img class="inline-icon" [src]="'assets/inicon/faction-' + faction.icon + '.png'" slot="start"></ion-img>
    <ion-label>{{ ('Factions.' + faction.name) | translate }}</ion-label>
  </ion-item>

  <ion-list-header>{{ 'DirectorsCut' | translate }}</ion-list-header>
  <ion-item (click)="close(faction.id)" *ngFor="let faction of dcFactions">
    <ion-img class="inline-icon" [src]="'assets/inicon/faction-' + faction.icon + '.png'" slot="start"></ion-img>
    <ion-label>{{ ('Factions.' + faction.name) | translate }}</ion-label>
  </ion-item>
  
  <ion-list-header>{{ 'Expansion 2' | translate }}</ion-list-header>
  <ion-item (click)="close(faction.id)" *ngFor="let faction of expansion2Factions">
    <ion-img class="inline-icon" [src]="'assets/inicon/faction-' + faction.icon + '.png'" slot="start"></ion-img>
    <ion-label>{{ ('Factions.' + faction.name) | translate }}</ion-label>
  </ion-item>

  <ion-list-header>{{ 'Expansion 3 (BETA)' | translate }}</ion-list-header>
  <ion-item (click)="close(faction.id)" *ngFor="let faction of expansion3Factions">
    <ion-img class="inline-icon" [src]="'assets/inicon/faction-' + faction.icon + '.png'" slot="start"></ion-img>
    <ion-label>{{ ('Factions.' + faction.name) | translate }}</ion-label>
  </ion-item>
  
</ion-list>

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
